macro.title: Shell Agrees to Buy Canada’s Arc Resources for $13.6 Billion - Bloomberg.com
macro.summary: Shell Plc agreed to buy Canadian oil and gas producer ARC Resources Ltd. for $13.6 billion, its biggest deal in more than a decade as it seeks to sustain output in the long term.

macro.title: China says it will reverse major AI acquisition by Meta - The Washington Post
macro.summary: The move against Manus AI is Beijing’s most aggressive step yet to stanch the loss of AI talent to the U.S., setting up a complicated legal and political fight.

macro.title: Verizon Rises On Earnings Beat, Surprise Subscriber Gain - Investor's Business Daily
macro.summary: The telecom added more high spending "postpaid" phone subscribers than seen.

macro.title: First State to Ban Dynamic Pricing at Grocery Stores - Newser
macro.summary: Maryland takes a stand against use of personal data to set prices
